Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9F00 "THEHOBBIT-1982VERSION-9F00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Hobbit, The (1982 Version).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is from the 1985 enhanced disk version
